title: The Crew Learns Sanji Is Gone
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on the crew learns sanji is gone within the The Team Divides Over Sanji storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's go see, let's go see,) let's go see Master Mexico- Mayshiii's

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's go see, let's go see,I? Let's go see Master Mexico- marshiii')

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Nami! Where are Sanji and Caesar!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't tell me that man just now kidnapped...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No! It's nothing like that. He chose to leave.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wanda! Carrot! This incident...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our friends here are trying to ask us to forget about it, but they don't want to be so rude as to say that out loud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Catch their drift.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Also, we'll be taking care of pekoms! There's no reason to get the "day" fools in a tizzy over nothing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thank you, Master...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No no! We can't be having you looking out for us all the time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Besides, we're the ones that should be thanking you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ah! is that catnip!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: strum Mmm~

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: Master Nekomamushi is a lonely one... When I think of him, an image comes to mind...)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A pure smile as he basks in the moonlight... my eyes gleam as I gaze at him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But under the light of the sun, he puts on AIRS... He lives on, alone, giving it his all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What a lovely song. Is that really who he is? Master Nekoma- mushi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm singing about how I imagine him to be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What do you mean "Nope"?

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Okay, guys! Sanji said "There's this chick he has to see real quick." Does that mean...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's gonna get married!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Perhaps. Perhaps not. We don't know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He had a sort of resigned, resolute look on his face when he said it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: but here he says "He'll be back. Promise."

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Ah! I get it! He's going to bring his bride back with him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That means our crew's gonna have another member!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: His bride-to-be is the daughter of a yonkou. Which means that after his marriage, we'd all become under-lings in big mom's pirate crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHATA-!? NO WAY!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Right you are. And I'm sure Sanji feels the same way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He was adamant about how against the idea he was.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And that's exactly why I think... what if...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What if he can't escape this marriage?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's right... knowing him,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's probably thinking of cutting himself off!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: WHATA-!? You mean Sanji's gonna quit our crew!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's even worse than being part of big mom's crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: he found a way to get us out of there;

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: had he wanted to, he would have been able to come with us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The fact that he wrote this letter...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: means that he knew that'd he'd have to go. Sanji...

summary: The Crew Learns Sanji Is Gone: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
